Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2025a/bin/matlab.exe" -batch "cd\('$\(pwd -W\)'\); addpath\('Data'\); addpath\(genpath\('Replication \(SVAR Factor\)/MONTE_CARLO/functions'\)\); [Data,~,~,~]=prepare_data\('Data/data_for_MC.xlsx'\); p=2; k=3; [y,x,n,T0,~]=prepare_BVAR_matrices\(Data,p\); [B,~,S]=getOLS\(y,x,n,p\); L=pcacov\(S\); L=L\(:,1:k\); disp\('Lambda from pcacov:'\); disp\(round\(L,4\)\); for j=1:k; L\(:,j\)=L\(:,j\)/L\(j,j\); end; disp\('Lambda normalized:'\); disp\(round\(L,2\)\);")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2025a/bin/matlab.exe" -batch "cd\('$\(pwd -W\)'\); addpath\('Data'\); addpath\(genpath\('Replication \(SVAR Factor\)/MONTE_CARLO/functions'\)\); [Data,~,~,~]=prepare_data\('Data/data_for_MC.xlsx'\); p=2; k=3; [y,x,n,T0,~]=prepare_BVAR_matrices\(Data,p\); [B,~,S]=getOLS\(y,x,n,p\); yhat=y-x*B; L=pcacov\(S\); L=L\(:,1:k\); F1=yhat*pinv\(L\)'; L2=yhat'*F1*inv\(F1'*F1\); disp\('L from pcacov:'\); disp\(round\(L\(1:3,1:3\),4\)\); disp\('L from OLS regress resid on F:'\); disp\(round\(L2\(1:3,1:3\),4\)\); for j=1:k; L2\(:,j\)=L2\(:,j\)/L2\(j,j\); end; disp\('L2 normalized:'\); disp\(round\(L2,2\)\);")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2025a/bin/matlab.exe" -batch "cd\('$\(pwd -W\)'\); addpath\('Data'\); addpath\(genpath\('Replication \(SVAR Factor\)/MONTE_CARLO/functions'\)\); [Data,~,~,~]=prepare_data\('Data/data_for_MC.xlsx'\); p=12; k=3; [y,x,n,T0,~]=prepare_BVAR_matrices\(Data,p\); [B,~,S]=getOLS\(y,x,n,p\); L=pcacov\(S\); L=L\(:,1:k\); for j=1:k; L\(:,j\)=L\(:,j\)/L\(j,j\); end; disp\('Lambda normalized \(P=12\):'\); disp\(round\(L,2\)\);")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2025a/bin/matlab.exe" -batch "cd\('$\(pwd -W\)'\); addpath\('Data'\); addpath\(genpath\('Replication \(SVAR Factor\)/MONTE_CARLO/functions'\)\); [Data,~,~,~]=prepare_data\('Data/data_for_MC.xlsx'\); p=2; k=3; [y,x,n,T0,~]=prepare_BVAR_matrices\(Data,p\); [B,~,S]=getOLS\(y,x,n,p\); yhat=y-x*B; disp\('--- pcacov\(S\) first 3 cols, first 3 rows:'\); L1=pcacov\(S\); disp\(round\(L1\(1:3,1:3\),4\)\); disp\('--- eigen of S \(vecs*sqrt\(vals\)\):'\); [V,D]=eig\(S\); [dv,idx]=sort\(diag\(D\),'descend'\); V2=V\(:,idx\(1:3\)\)*diag\(sqrt\(dv\(1:3\)\)\); disp\(round\(V2\(1:3,1:3\),4\)\); disp\('--- extract.m:'\); [F2,L3]=extract\(zscore\(yhat\),k\); disp\('L from extract \(first 3 rows\):'\); disp\(round\(L3\(1:3,:\),4\)\); disp\('L from extract normalized:'\); for j=1:k; L3\(:,j\)=L3\(:,j\)/L3\(j,j\); end; disp\(round\(L3,2\)\);")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MATLAB/R2025a/bin/matlab.exe" -batch "cd\('$\(pwd -W\)'\); addpath\('Data'\); addpath\(genpath\('Replication \(SVAR Factor\)/MONTE_CARLO/functions'\)\); [Data,~,~,~]=prepare_data\('Data/data_for_MC.xlsx'\); p=2; [y,x,n,T0,~]=prepare_BVAR_matrices\(Data,p\); [B,~,S]=getOLS\(y,x,n,p\); writematrix\(round\(B,10\),'Data/_M_B_ols.csv'\); fprintf\('B dim: %d x %d\\n',size\(B\)\); disp\(round\(B\(1:3,1:3\),6\)\);")
